error TLUA2688: Cannot find type definition file for 'n'.
  The file is in the program because:
    Entry point of type library 'n' specified in compilerOptions


!!! error TLUA2688: Cannot find type definition file for 'n'.
!!! error TLUA2688:   The file is in the program because:
